title: umbilicus luteus
intro: Umbilicus luteus, also known as Gold of Pleasure or Creeping Jenny, is a perennial flowering plant with yellow flowers and fleshy, succulent leaves. The medicinal properties of Umbilicus luteus include its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing due to its high levels of flavonoids and anthraquinones. The health benefits of the plant include its use as a treatment for various skin conditions, such as acne and eczema, as well as its potential to reduce stress and anxiety. Umbilicus luteus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in various forms.
